justification: Senator Young's official press release explicitly names Heinrich, Booker, and Rounds as co-introducers of the CREATE AI Act, directly evidencing the co-sponsorship relationship.

Senator Young's official press release explicitly names Heinrich, Booker, and Rounds as co-introducers of the CREATE AI Act, directly evidencing the co-sponsorship relationship between Heinrich and Booker.
